name: Fanout
description: Fanout — Managed real-time API layer providing WebSocket and HTTP streaming push for API subscriptions.

seo.title: Fanout — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Fanout: Fanout — Managed real-time API layer providing WebSocket and HTTP streaming push for API subscriptions.

when_to_use: WebSocket push for real-time API subscription updates
HTTP streaming for live data feed in SaaS product
Server-sent events for dashboard live data without polling
Managed real-time layer on top of existing REST API
Pub/sub push for event-driven API clients

pros: Real-time push layer as a service
Works with HTTP streaming and WebSocket
cons: Docs around pricing and plans murky
review.verdict: Powerful real-time proxy tech, but Ably and Pusher have clearer product focus for most teams today.
review.best_for: API teams adding realtime push without building WebSocket infra
review.not_for: Apps wanting a turnkey realtime SDK and mobile-ready channels

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
